$description: Supergraphic Panel — the Chat Archaeologist visual design system. Source palette and font families are extracted from packages/viewer/src/styles.css. Scale tokens (radius, shadow, duration, font.size, font.weight, status aliases) are prescriptive additions authored for replicators; see design-system/spec.md for rationale.

sunflower.$description: Primary text and titles. Never decorative.

sunflower-muted.$description: Pre-composited sunflower × 0.85 over black. Solid background for inactive sidebar items so black text holds 10.25:1 WCAG AAA regardless of backdrop.

butterscotch.$description: Chrome: top bar, sidebar elbows, ALL-CAPS labels, dividers. Never body text.

butterscotch-muted.$description: Muted chrome for inactive mobile pill-bar items. Carries sunflower foreground at AA.

ice.$description: Data and code: model names, inline code, quantitative highlights. Decorative use forbidden.

violet.$description: Thinking / processing state: streaming indicators, semantic-analysis running, copy-to-MD action.

peach.$description: Cost and error accent: cost bars, error banners, CLI-Direct badge. Attention, not alarm.

bg-1.$description: Card and panel surface. One step above root.

bg-2.$description: Card hover surface. One step above bg-1.

text.$description: Alias for sunflower when used as a text color. Same value, semantic role differs.

dim.$description: Reserved for inert placeholder glyphs (em-dashes, "—", missing values). Not for functional text — fails WCAG AA for body.

divider.$description: rgba(221, 153, 68, 0.18). Panel and card borders. Inherits from butterscotch at low alpha.

chrome.$description: ALL-CAPS labels, KPI values, titles, pills, top-bar. The voice of the chrome.

prose.$description: Body text inside cards and messages (≥12px paragraph text). IBM Plex Sans.

mono.$description: Model names, timestamps, code, keyboard hints, axis ticks. JetBrains Mono.

regular.$description: Prescriptive: Body prose only. Both IBM Plex Sans and JetBrains Mono ship a regular weight.

medium.$description: Prescriptive: Default chrome weight. Antonio at 500 is the reliable fallback when 600/700 feel heavy.

bold.$description: Prescriptive: Titles, pills, ALL-CAPS labels, KPI values. The chrome default for anything that should read as a label.

9.$description: Prescriptive: Row-label and legend caps. Floor for legible Antonio caps with 0.18em tracking.

10.$description: Prescriptive: Sidebar short badge, filter-row labels.

12.$description: Prescriptive: Body prose floor inside cards.

15.$description: Prescriptive: Session-card titles. Oddly specific on purpose — verified optically against the 2-line clamp at tier A.

18.$description: Prescriptive: Top-bar title at tier B+.

sm.$description: Prescriptive: Card and panel corners at mobile tier.

md.$description: Prescriptive: Card and panel corners at tablet / desktop.

lg.$description: Prescriptive: Mid-bar and mode-area at desktop.

pill.$description: Prescriptive: Source-pill, top-bar source-buttons (sized to half-height).

pill-lg.$description: Prescriptive: Narrow-banner, command-mode "more" button, search input at tier B+.

elbow.$description: Prescriptive: Sidebar elbow at mobile. Asymmetric: `32px 0 0 0` or `0 0 0 32px` — never four-corner-equal.

elbow-lg.$description: Prescriptive: Sidebar elbow at desktop. Anchors the L-corner where vertical and horizontal arms meet.

none.$description: Prescriptive: Default. The system does not use drop shadows for hierarchy — hierarchy comes from left-accent rules, border color, and surface stepping (bg → bg-1 → bg-2).

panel.$description: Prescriptive: Reserved for floating panels that escape the frame (info-popover, rescan-banner, tier-sheet backdrop). Never on in-frame cards.

ring-ice.$description: Prescriptive: Focus ring for quantitative / ice-accent contexts. Ring pulse, not glow.

ring-violet.$description: Prescriptive: Focus ring for thinking / violet-accent contexts.

fast.$description: Prescriptive: Background color transitions on sidebar items, pill-bar pills.

base.$description: Prescriptive: Default card hover transition (background, border, transform).

boot.$description: Prescriptive: Full boot cascade from top-bar through command-mode cards. Individual panel animations sit at 400–600ms with staggered delays.

pulse-focus.$description: Prescriptive: Focus-pulse animations on filter-bar rows when navigated via analysis-tab cards.

concept.$description: Earliest / thinking state. Maps to violet. Prescriptive.

active.$description: In-progress / primary state. Maps to sunflower. Prescriptive.

open-pr.$description: In review / quantitative active state. Maps to ice. Prescriptive.

merged.$description: Completed / steady chrome state. Maps to butterscotch. Prescriptive.

released.$description: Shipped / notable accent. Maps to peach. Prescriptive.
